title: Deep Blue: A Bettas & Aquatics Addon!
description: Adds large ocean creatures to the DragN’s Bettas & Aquatics mod!
body:
**Welcome to the Deep Blue Sea!**



Deep Blue is an (official) addon made for Bettas & Aquatics that adds sharks, whales, and other marine animals to the oceans. Create a huge commercial aquarium, or just jump into the ocean to admire the new creatures!



**Current Added Aquatics**

-Great White Shark

-Mako Shark

-Coelacanth

-Hammerhead Shark

-Whale Shark

+Krill & Shrimp Swarms. Yummy!



Need to report a bug, or just want to chat about Deep Blue? Here’s our Discord! https://discord.gg/jbjMCEMA4g

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
